title: Add Rust discovery/indexing benchmark
description: Benchmark Rust indexing for single-project vs recursive multi-project discovery. Capture latency metrics.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Rust discovery/indexing benchmark implemented in rust/src/bin/discovery_benchmark.rs (serial and parallel, single vs multi).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Rust benchmark or binary reports timing for both modes.
